response.step_by_step_log: Identified 'Like! Like! Like!' and 'Je t'aime ★ Je t'aime' through on-screen text. 'Like! Like! Like!' appears to be an original song/theme for the event with no readily available public lyrics, so lyrics were set to null. 'Je t'aime ★ Je t'aime' was searched as "Je t'aime ★ Je t'aime Tommy february6 lyrics", successfully locating the lyrics on corichan.com. Metadata and performer identification were based on on-screen labels and visual observation.
response.global_summary: A video of a live virtual concert performance by Hololive VTubers Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, and Mori Calliope. It features two songs, separated by a brief interlude and introduction.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Like! Like! Like!' by FuwaMoco and Mori Calliope. Title appears in top-left.
scenes.performer_in_video: Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, and Mori Calliope

scenes.description: Interlude and introduction of the next song, with on-screen text listing credits.
